creator: bsd@j-star.org
text:
The error did come from a previously configured system that had been running adguardhome for a while.

If I run adguardhome built against go 1.18.9 in a fresh jail with no previous configuration then it launches successfully. However if I run through the configuration wizard in a web browser, accepting the default values (with an arbitrary user and password), then upon stopping adguardhome and trying to restart it, it fails with the error message above.

So it looks like this only affects instances that have been configured. Is it possible that this is why you didn't see the failure in your test?
